title: Sprint 54 Wave B: Fix BuildStallDetail timeout count — exclude confirmed blocks
description:
Evidence: BuildStallDetail reports "217/217 placed, 101 timed out" — contradictory. Root cause: the sweep marks place actions as TimedOut before BlockPlacedEvent arrives, but the late event still calls AdvanceBuildCheckpoint which sets block status to "placed". The timeout count includes actions that were later confirmed.

Fix: in BuildStallDetail, only count timeouts for blocks whose world-fact status is NOT "placed". If a block is "placed" in facts, its timeout is stale (late event already confirmed it). Only count timeouts for blocks still in "pending" or "in-progress" status.
